---
title: "CBSG"
subtitle: "18th March 2026"
author: 
  - "Carlos Cámara-Menoyo"
institute: Centre for Interdisciplinary Methodologies (University of Warwick)
format: 
    revealjs:
      theme: [default, ../../styles/slides.scss, ../../styles/fonts.scss]
---

::: callout-important
## AI warning

No AI whatsoever was used in the creation of this presentation or their supporting materials.
:::

# What I said in my application

> I will be building CriticAI, a community of practice to critically enquiry about AI’s adoption in HE and influence in the decision-making processes to ensure that AI usage is aligned with academia’s ethos.

Aims:
1. Influence decision-making processes in HE to ensure that AI usage is aligned with academia’s ethos through collective action
2. Meet and connect with like-minded people
3. Share knowledge, experiences and resources about AI in HE
4. Do something together (collective action)

Screenshot from application

# What I've done so far...

##  {#logo .center data-menu-title="A logo!"}

First things, first... a logo!

![](/media/criticAI_logo.png){width="600"}

##  {#video .center data-menu-title="A video"}

![](/media/AI_video_phone.GIF){fig-align="center"}

## A [matrix] space

![](media/matrix-space.png){fig-align="center"}



## A [matrix] space 2 {.hidden}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}
![](media/matrix-space.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
Why [matrix]?

- Federated, open-source, privacy-preserving, secure, decentralised, interoperable, and free.
- Can be bridged to other platforms
- Looks nice and works well 

:::

::::



## GitHub Organisation

![[https://github.com/CriticAI-HE](https://github.com/CriticAI-HE?view_as=public)](media/github-organisation.png){fig-align="center"}


## First planned activity!

SSI CW2026 workshop



## But...

- I have not told anyone about the community yet.
- Website is empty
  - No info about community's aims, activities, or how to join.
- No messages in the Matrix space or the GitHub organisation.
- Zero members!


::: callout-important
## Analysis paralysis warning

I'm stuck! Support is welcome!
:::

# Analysis paralysis!

## About the community

- What kind of community do I want to build?
  - Support group? (therapy) 
  - Union (collective action and bargaining power)
  - Social (networking and sharing)
  - Learning (knowledge sharing and skill development)
  - Something else?
- Where to start?
  - Unconf may be too big and intimidating for a first activity
  - Reading group?
  - Survey?
- Who is the community for?
  - Academics? RSEs? Just from the UK? 
- What's the community's stance on AI?

## 


## Tools
